title: What is a fair CO2 tax increase? On fair emission reductions in the transport sector

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: CO2 tax on gasoline and diesel
tax_mentions.context: Support for increases in Sweden's CO2 tax on gasoline and diesel.
Respondents choose whether to vote in favour of an increased CO2 tax.

inclusion_reason: Direct survey analysis of support for increasing Sweden's CO2 tax on gasoline and diesel, with fairness preferences as explanatory determinants.
